alt: Yola Rowana Central Asia travel planning
main_label: We know the road across Central Asia
short_des: Yola Rowana creates private and small group journeys across Central Asia — connecting Silk Road cities, desert routes, mountain landscapes, nomad culture, and local experiences with practical route planning and reliable support.

review.title: Local route knowledge
review.label: From Ashgabat and Darvaza to Samarkand, Bukhara, the Pamirs and mountain roads, we plan journeys around real distances, borders, timing and traveler comfort.

review.title: Private and small group journeys
review.label: We design flexible routes for travelers who want culture, landscapes, history and local connection — not rushed, copy-paste itineraries.
